# Nintendo (7974.T) Stock Price — May 2026 Research Report

## Current Price & Today's Trading (May 20, 2026)

Nintendo Co., Ltd. (7974.T) on the Tokyo Stock Exchange closed at **¥7,506** on May 20, 2026, down **¥13 (-0.17%)** from the previous close of ¥7,519. The stock opened at ¥7,635, traded to an intraday high of ¥7,670 and an intraday low of ¥7,430. Volume was **9,392,500 shares**, below the 10-day average volume of ~16.5 million shares and the longer-term average of ~11.6 million.

The US-listed ADR (NTDOY) was trading at **$11.74**, up from a previous close of $11.44.

### Key Observations:
- **May 11 saw a sharp selloff**: The stock dropped to ¥7,020 on extremely heavy volume of 35.9 million shares (3x normal), opening at ¥6,955.
- **52-week low was hit on May 14-15** at **¥6,849**, before a recovery began.
- The stock has since rebounded ~9.6% from the ¥6,849 low to the current ¥7,506.
- Over the past 3 months, the stock is down approximately **10.9%** (from ~¥8,422 in late February).

## Summary

Nintendo's stock has experienced significant downward pressure through May 2026, hitting a fresh 52-week low of ¥6,849 on May 15 before recovering modestly to ¥7,506. The stock is trading roughly 49% below its 52-week high of ¥14,795. Despite the price decline, fundamentals show strong revenue growth (95.1%) and earnings growth (57.1%), with a moderate trailing P/E of ~20.6. The recent heavy volume selloff around May 11 (35.9M shares, ~3x normal) suggests a significant market event drove the decline. The stock's low beta of 0.158 indicates it typically moves independently of the broader market.
